primary_flags.summary: Bruise welfare check DARVO reversal. Apr 12 2026. ROW-15588: 'Why do you keep trying to make Olivia think I'm abusing her?' — Eli noticed a bruise on Olivia's forearm, asked what happened, Olivia said she didn't know, Eli noted it looked like a thumb-mark and asked if someone grabbed her arm, Olivia said it might be horseplaying. CP2 Q2: this was an appropriate parental welfare check — Eli did not press, did not coach, and accepted Olivia's explanation. Melissa's DARVO response converts protective parental behavior into a campaign to plant abuse suspicions. Category D (projection — PROJ-004): Melissa accuses Eli of making Olivia think Melissa is abusing her, while RF-11 documents Melissa's own child-exposure pattern. Sev-2 (sustained projected accusation; PROJ-004 confirmed; inverts the parent-protective-behavior dynamic at the dataset close).
